```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Design practical caching to cut repeated compute and I/O cost.
---
Task:
Propose cache layers and key strategy for high-cost, high-repeat operations.
Requirements:
Define key shape, TTL/eviction policy, invalidation triggers, and hit-rate targets.
Constraints:
Prevent stale/poisoned data, bound memory use, and include fallback behavior.
Success Criteria:
Provide a cache plan with expected hit rate, latency improvement, and risk controls.
```
